description_long: This is a rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a slanted top and a single, wide front panel. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, slightly greenish-brown appearance. A recessed handle is centered on the front panel, allowing for easy opening of the main compartment. The cabinet's construction appears sturdy, with reinforced edges and a solid base. The top surface is flat and can support additional objects, while the slanted design may help prevent items from being left on top. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for storing documents or supplies in an organized manner.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a slanted top, visible wood grain, and a recessed front handle. Its simple, functional design is ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet is visible, showing the slanted top and the wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: The front view displays the wide front panel with a recessed handle and the flat, slanted top surface.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet is shown, mirroring the left with the slanted top and wood grain.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no handles or openings.
